entity.summary: World Chain decentralized swap aggregator and wallet-tracking application that routes token swaps inside the World Chain Mini App ecosystem and generates current on-chain swap volume and fees.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies HumanFi as a World Chain DEX aggregator and reports non-zero current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour swap volume, fees, and revenue. A stable standalone first-party product website was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset. The project social identity is preserved for corroboration.

evidence.title: HumanFi project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used as identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: HumanFi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies HumanFi as a World Chain DEX aggregator and reports non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour swap volume plus current fees and revenue, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HumanFi DEX aggregator discovery entry
evidence.notes: Structured aggregator registry surface independently preserves HumanFi's World Chain swap-aggregation identity and complements the protocol metrics record.
